note: Six Through the Night — campaign initialized
cold metal swings, locked cage, parked truck. group briefly pauses.
debate zone_2 vs zone_3. p6 quietly advocates zone_2 (underpass).
underpass. damp, echo, dim light. old jacket on bench.
Эльза notices wet_cardboard, feels cold through shoes.
Дима kicks trash can, echo sends group into brief panic. stress spike.
Касандра accuses Дмитрий of hiding something. he stays quiet.
Эльза whispers in English to Борис: are we going to die here. Борис silent.
Оля reaches for old_jacket_underpass on bench.
Дима steps on wet_cardboard, falls hard. pain 22. confusion.
Оля physically blocks Дима from getting up fast. 'you'll make noise.' Дима doesn't understand.
Дима feels rejected, pushed away. Оля feels justified.
Касандра briefly moves toward zone_3, then circles back. claims she was checking.
Борис assesses zone_3 (gas station) vs service_road. calls zone_3 the only viable forward path.
Дмитрий notes to self: they're moving but not escaping. pursuit is partially internal.
Эльза whispers she hears something behind. group freezes. it's wind.
Борис at zone_3 entrance. gas station visible ahead — lit.

text: мы не убегаем. не по-настоящему. но и не в безопасности.
note: Дмитрий speaks quietly in Russian. unclear if others heard.
